title: Twisted Mobs
description: Add over 20 new mobs, ranging from alternative forms of existing ones to new creatures that will make your adventure a true challenge.
body:
**
Twisted Mobs unleashes a vast legion of hostile creatures, ranging from warped versions of classic mobs to entirely unseen entities. These beings lurk in every corner of the three dimensions, transforming your adventure into a true odyssey of survival.
**

**➤ Added mobs across all 3 dimensions (Overworld, Nether and End)**
**➤ Added new variants for vanilla mobs**
➜ 3 new types of zombies
_↪ Crawler_
_↪ Giant_
_↪ Titan_
➜ 3 new types of skeletons
_↪ Skeleton (melee)_
_↪ Blaster_
_↪ Warp_
➜ 3 new types of creepers
_↪ Infestor_
_↪ Watcher_
_↪ Xenoth_
➜ 3 new types of spiders
_↪ Goliath_ / `update 1.7.0 or above`
_↪ Venom_ / `update 1.8.0 or above`
_↪ Atrax (with its respective variant)_ / `update 1.9.0 or above`
**➤ Added new mobs**
➜ Glance (with its respective variants)
➜ Gazer (with its respective variants)
➜ Sentry (with its respective variants)
➜ Gritlock
➜ Ashclutch
➜ Dustcrag
➜ Mimic
➜ Skitter
➜ Smiling
➜ Rotting (with its respective variant)
➜ Harmful (with its respective variant)
➜ Stinger
➜ Vraal / `update 1.1.0 or above`
➜ Vassezel / `update 1.2.0 or above`
➜ Glarp / `update 1.3.0 or above`
➜ Fungit (with its respective variant) / `update 1.4.0 or above`
➜ Cragshroom (with its respective variant) / `update 1.5.0 or above`
➜ Vrox / `update 1.6.0 or above`
➤ Added new items (bones, gunpowder, membranes, flesh, and more)
➤ Added new blocks (traps, stone, fences, walls and more)
